svg_content:

stroke_style: thick dry-erase marker with organic wobble
topological_morph_notes: The Ouroboros loop transforms into the spiraling brim of a magician's hat to set up the illusion-shattering metaphor in Board 6.
qualia_alignment: Isolated SVG paths successfully split into After Skool compositional layers.
